text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Lemme see what your shirt looks
like untucked.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, nice. It looks good that way.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no need to thank me. I just brought it up
'cause I noticed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you do the same for me during practice,
right? You know, giving advice.
